title: Lost Mazes
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8810de1891c8375641ebc3a912ce0615210f49ff.png)

Lost Mazes is a mod that aims to add ambient structures to wasteland type of biomes such as: badlands, swamps, end midlands, sparse jungles, cherry groves and icespikes. all the structures don't use jigsaw blocks and has 3 variants each (except for the jungle maze). Each biome listed above as it's own loot tables.

![Added content](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb0a40dfa076810ee314394897964f3b7b02767.png)
- Badlands maze 1
- Badlands maze 2
- Badlands maze 3
- Swamp maze 1
- Swamp maze 2
- Swamp maze 3
- End maze 1
- End maze 2
- End maze 3
- Cherry maze 1
- Cherry maze 2
- Cherry maze 3
- Jungle maze 
- Ice spikes maze 1
- Ice spikes maze 2
- Ice spikes maze 3
